description: A web-based 3D simulation of a mushroom cloud using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Three.js.

recent_changes.description: Prolonged fireball lifetime and increased proportion of flames within the smoke cloud.
details: Extended fireball, cooling, and heat lifetimes in SimulationTimeline.js to let the fire last longer.
Prolonged the additive fireball mesh duration in Fireball.js (from 5s to 9s) and adjusted its expansion/fade curve.
Modified volumeFrag shader in shaders.js to keep temperatures higher inside the stem and cap, and lowered the threshold for blending fire colors (from 0.48 to 0.28).
Updated billowFrag shader in shaders.js to increase fire color intensity (bright yellow/orange instead of dark ember) and lowered mixing threshold (from 0.58 to 0.20).
Increased initial temperatures of smoke particles at spawn and reduced the cooling decay rate in MushroomCloud.js, making the rolling outer smoke glow with realistic fire and cool down gradually.

recent_changes.description: Removed quality options and updated initial defaults for maximum visual appeal.
details: Removed the 'Quality' selection dropdown and 'adaptiveQuality' checkbox from the GUI (DebugUI.js) and codebase (main.js).
Set new high-quality, cinematic default values for the simulation.
Removed adaptive quality monitoring logic to keep rendering resolution consistently sharp.
